# BindForge NW

BindForge NW is a browser-based Neverwinter keybind builder and console-command generator.

## Primary use cases

- Search Neverwinter keybind presets.
- Filter binds by class, command type, and safety level.
- Browse Neverwinter console commands.
- Browse safe, advanced, and risky key combinations.
- Generate copy-ready `/bind` commands.
- Generate `/unbind` commands.
- Create custom command arguments.
- Review warnings for movement, menu, mouse, chat, and Windows shortcut keys.

## Key categories

- Invocation and character
- Targeting
- VIP services
- Bard songs
- Animation cancel
- Combat
- Companion
- Inventory and buffs
- Loot and interact
- Utility
- Camera and screenshot
- Social
- Risky and testing

## Technical summary

- Next.js 16
- React 19
- TypeScript
- Tailwind CSS 4
- Static data for presets, commands, and key combinations
- Clipboard-based command copying

## Repository

https://github.com/Nischhalsubba/BindForge-NW

## Accuracy note

Neverwinter commands and valid key combinations can change. Risky or undocumented commands should be tested carefully.

## Disclaimer

This is an independent community project and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Cryptic Studios, Arc Games, Gearbox Publishing, or the Neverwinter rights holders.
